question: How do I apply for a hostel at LPU?
answer: Apply through UMS portal (ums.lpu.in) under Student Services > Hostel Allotment. Apply within 7 days of admission confirmation. Hostel fee: Rs 85,000-1,10,000/year depending on room type (shared/single, AC/Non-AC). First-come-first-served basis. Contact: hostel@lpu.in | Block 65.

question: Is hostel mandatory at LPU?
answer: Hostel is not mandatory at LPU for most programs. However, first-year international students are required to stay in university hostels. Day scholars can live off-campus in the surrounding areas like Phagwara and Jalandhar. Contact the hostel office at hostel@lpu.in for your specific program requirements.
